title: British Kale Crumble
description: A hearty and comforting British-inspired dish featuring crispy kale and a tangy crumble topping.

ingredients.name: Crumble Topping
ingredients.notes: See below for crumble topping ingredients

instructions: Chop the onion and mince the garlic.
In a large skillet, sauté the chopped onion and minced garlic in butter until softened.
Add the chopped kale to the skillet and cook until wilted.
Season the kale mixture with salt and pepper to taste.
In a separate bowl, mix together the flour and crumble topping ingredients.
Transfer the kale mixture to a baking dish and top with the crumble topping.
Bake in the preheated oven for 20-25 minutes, or until the topping is golden brown.
